leadText: Shadow (シャドー) has several referrals: For the corrupted Pokémon found in Orre, see Shadow Pokémon For Shadow Pokémon in Pokémon GO, see Shadow Pokémon (GO). For the moves exclusive to Shadow Pokémon, see Shadow move For the organization known as Shadow in Japanese, see Cipher For the shadows found on Driftveil Drawbridge and Marvelous Bridge, see Phenomenon For the Trainers known as Shadow, see Shadow Triad For the TCG Theme Deck, see Shadows (TCG)
